horoscope: Venus heads into your communications sector today, dear Aries, where it will visit until May 18th. Your need to share your thoughts and feelings increases–and so does your ability to do so! This easygoing transit is strong for new interests and conveying your message well. With the goddess of love and harmony working her magic in your sector of connecting and learning, you're expressing yourself with considerable charm. You enjoy learning, conversing, and bonding more deeply. It's an excellent time to harmonize with relatives and acquaintances. You might receive positive publicity, and your mindset is positive, helping you across the board. Venus brings more pleasure, charm, and warmth to your communications and daily affairs. It refines, improves, and enhances your abilities to socialize, learn, and connect. Mental compatibility is of particular importance in love relationships in the weeks ahead. Today, people in your life are more likely to appreciate your unique vision and perspective. Following a passion or a new interest can be exciting.

Venus leaves your sign and enters your resources sector today, dear Taurus, where it will visit until May 18th. This is a great time for engaging in activities that soothe, comfort, and boost your confidence. Your search for security and comfort strongly influences your tastes, style, and affections in the weeks ahead. You enjoy making the most of your current circumstances. Building and collecting appeal to you more than usual in the weeks ahead. Attracting the right resources can be easy and natural in the weeks ahead! You're getting in touch with your feelings and appreciating people in your life. It's also strong for better understanding your money situation and basic needs. Venus is your planetary ruler, and its transit here brings out your natural love of comfort and predictability. Grounding activities help you heal. The Moon is pulling you into yourself today. Using your resources more effectively or making the most of what you already have can be satisfying right now.

Venus moves into your sign today, dear Gemini, where it will visit until May 18th. This fabulous cycle connects you with your powers of attraction. In the weeks ahead, you'll be expressing yourself more freely, and others will take notice! Enjoying and pampering yourself can be in focus. In the past few weeks, with Venus in your privacy sector, you may have kept your feelings private or at bay. You're now more noticeable and clearer about your passions, needs, and wants. You may feel as if you're beginning a new cycle of love at this time, or starting fresh with greater expressiveness. During this transit, there is a stronger focus on pleasure and love in your life. You're giving out good vibes and receiving them in return. Today is strong for sharing and connecting or seeking activities that engage your mind. You seem to be on others' radar today, and you can find yourself in demand.

Venus heads into your solar twelfth house today, dear Cancer, making it a good time to process recent events and current feelings. While love matters could become more complicated or difficult to understand during this cycle until May 18th, you're also learning much about your innermost desires and longings. It may take time and soul-searching, but it's sure to be a revealing process. Benefits come from paying more attention to the hidden elements and patterns of your interactions. You can be looking at your life, feelings, and relationships in a new light during this cycle. It's a time for checking in with your deeper feelings about a matter or a person. The introspection you do now can be constructive for May 18th onward, when Venus will spend time in your sign, and you're likely to feel refreshed and ready to turn over a whole new leaf in your romantic or social life. Until then, love may be private, undercover, or confusing. It's a great time to enjoy some privacy, hidden pleasures, or personal time. Today, the Moon spends the day in your resources sector, and you pay particular attention to what makes you feel most comfortable. You're establishing your needs and wants and exploring ways to satisfy them at this time of the lunar month.

Venus begins its transit of your friendship sector today, dear Leo, where it will visit until May 18th, bringing good-natured energy to your social life and networking activities. During this cycle, you can gain a stronger sense of fulfillment through activities with and for others. You seek and value equality in your interactions more than usual. Allowing people more space and freedom is especially important now, and you may very well need the same. If you want to make peace with someone, this is a good time to do so. The weeks ahead are also strong for joining a group, working as a team, socializing with associates, networking, and setting long-range happiness goals. Your happiness goals, wishes, and dreams assume more importance. As well, you can be a warm influence on others. Today holds good energy for arriving at an understanding about a long-standing problem. You might strengthen a friendship through your shared interests and viewpoints. You're likely to feel stronger as you learn valuable skills. You are a little braver than usual, particularly when it comes to entertaining new ideas or expressing your feelings.

Venus heads into your solar tenth house today, dear Virgo, and you're in good shape for enjoying the pursuit of your goals. Venus will be in this area of your solar chart until May 18th, blessing your career, reputation, and responsibilities. It's a good time to soften or enhance your reputation, with charming, friendly, and artistic Venus boosting business, career, and status or standing. Your personality, concern, care, or artistry can be bigger contributing factors to your success and enjoyment during this cycle. It's a good time for publicity, but also for finding -- or creating -- more pleasure in setting goals and working towards them. Social opportunities can come through professional dealings or business in the weeks ahead, or you project especially warm and appealing energy in your professional life. You are more aware of how you come across, as well as how responsible you are with your money and pleasure-seeking activities. The best way to constructively use this transit is to become clearer about what you want and desire, and to behave honorably as you pursue it. You may be recognized as a good role model now. Today, however, taking a step back from the world in some meaningful way can be appropriate and replenishing temporarily, with the Moon in your solar twelfth house. It's a good time to catch your breath, as you may need a little more time to yourself than usual. You might crave release from overstimulation.

Venus enters your solar ninth house today, dear Libra, where it will visit until May 18th. You can be inspired by a topic, idea, or person during this cycle. Someone may awaken in you a different perspective or way of thinking. Learning new things can be most pleasurable--you're seeking something to do or learn that stirs you. It's also a generally braver time for expressing your feelings. This Venus transit frames you nicely and boosts your appeal in the weeks ahead. Your relationships may benefit from a change of pace. You might meet someone special through places of learning or non-routine experiences. You're attracted to people who share many of your beliefs or who have an interesting perspective to offer you. Your feelings tend to be easier to express and understand, and when it comes to love, your ideals are high. Today, the Moon transits your social sector, and it's a good time of the lunar month to seek inspiration. Transits today are strong for solving a problem or coming up with a clever idea.

Venus enters your solar eighth house today, dear Scorpio, where it will visit until May 18th, positioning you well for bonding with someone (or your own feelings) more deeply. Even so, it's not the most straightforward transit for outward expressions of love and affection. This cycle instead favors a focus on the more intricate or complex side of your relationships or finances. Approaching the trickier gray areas of life with more grace, charm, and understanding can help boost your life in key ways. It's a good cycle for finding support or backing from others, both emotionally and financially. A light approach to heavier topics can help you make sense of things and reach agreements with others. You can get the chance to decomplicate or sort through emotional issues, financial problems, and struggles arising from complex power dynamics. Today, you feel more confident when you get in better touch with your goals. Going your own way in your work or with your routines is satisfying. Sometimes you need a little boost that reminds you to take better care of your life, and extra attention coming your way right now can be it.

Venus enters your partnership sector today, dear Sagittarius, and will transit this area of your solar chart until May 18th. It's a favorable cycle for attracting and improving close relationships, especially one-on-one connections. You attract others who are helpful or kind, or you seek more company than usual, and it feels good to share your activities and ideas with someone. The weeks ahead favor activities such as counseling, legal matters, partnerships, and negotiations. You're more inclined to make peace with people, and you're more hospitable or approachable. It's also a period of more joy experienced through others. Today, you receive an energetic boost. You're in touch with your instincts and expressing yourself more naturally. You could feel a stronger desire for movement or variety.

Venus begins its transit of your work and health sector today, dear Capricorn, launching a cycle that can boost your satisfaction with -- or enjoyment of -- your work and daily routines. You'll be bringing more harmony to your everyday life in the weeks ahead. You might especially enjoy supporting and helping others during this cycle. It may also be that your job improves as you add more personality and warmth to what you do, or that you receive excellent feedback for your efforts. You can find more pleasure, benefits, or joy in your daily routines, work, service, and efforts to improve your health. Cooperation and sharing can play a significant and successful role in your work and, perhaps, even your wellness routines. It can be a good time to attract suitable or pleasurable work. It's not a showy time for your love life, but it's a good cycle for attending to the more practical aspects of relationships. Today is strong for keeping busy, even with a somewhat retiring disposition due to the Moon in your solar eighth house all day. You might actively work at improving your home life or your feelings of security and comfort.

Venus begins its transit of your solar fifth house today, dear Aquarius, and will visit until May 18th, harmonizing with your sign and encouraging you to express yourself more freely or playfully. You feel exceptionally comfortable in your own skin during this period, and others take notice! It can be a time for enjoying happy events related to romance or recreational pastimes. Your natural charm is appreciated more than usual, and you harmonize with others more easily. The weeks ahead are likely to be smoother than usual socially and can be excellent for discovering or reconnecting with a hobby. This transit brings lightness, warmth, and graciousness into your life, and it’s particularly good for your powers of attraction. Transits today support sharing and connecting, as well as enthusiasm for your interests and projects. With the Moon in your partnership sector all day, you're more interactive and interested in feedback.

Venus begins its transit of your solar fourth house today, dear Pisces, visiting there until May 18th. This cycle brings a strong focus on harmony and warmth in your home and with family matters in the coming weeks. It's a rather insular cycle, but it's excellent for gaining a deeper understanding of your needs, desires, and feelings, as well as for connecting with loved ones. It can be a time to seek greater security and familiarity, and you may be more cautious than usual when it comes to pursuing pleasure, spending money, and expressing your affections during this cycle. You might have the opportunity to strengthen and improve your family relationships. Living conditions might improve. You are also building a better relationship with yourself, and some self-nurturing and pampering can help this process along. Make a point of spending more quality time with those closest to your heart. Today's transits are good for feeling stronger in your self-improvement efforts. It's easier to see what needs improvement with your habits, daily life, and wellness.
